text: Change the building's stone facade to a vibrant red brick texture while keeping the architectural details and clock visible.

demos.text: Change the artistic style from watercolor to a detailed oil painting with richer textures and deeper shadows, enhancing the three-dimensional appearance of the car and balloons.

Transform the living room into a cozy winter evening scene by changing the lighting to warm golden tones, adding soft glowing string lights around the bookshelf and along the ceiling, and replacing the bright daylight outside with a snowy landscape visible through the windows.
Change the coat's fabric texture to a plush, velvety material while maintaining the same gray color and structure.
Change the scene to a snowy winter day with snow falling gently, and replace the archery target with a large snowman target covered in colorful balloons.

Change the image to a dynamic watercolor painting style, with vibrant splashes of color and soft brushstrokes that highlight the motion of the motorcycles and riders, while keeping the WSBK logo and text clearly legible.
Change the car's color scheme from white and blue to a vibrant red and black racing livery with gold accents, while keeping the same car model and number.
Change the color scheme of the jacket to a deep forest green with black sleeves and red zipper pulls, while keeping the same design and texture.

Transform the room into a winter scene by adding a light snowfall, covering the floor and furniture with a thin layer of snow, and changing the lighting to a soft, cool blue tone to simulate a snowy evening.

text: Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and translucent washes of color, while maintaining the focus on the carpenter's hands and tools.

demos.text: Convert the architectural blueprint into a vibrant watercolor painting style, maintaining all the original details and dimensions while adding soft color washes and visible brushstrokes to give it an artistic, hand-painted appearance.

Transform the scene into a whimsical winter wonderland by adding a light dusting of snowflakes falling gently, changing the background to a cozy snow-covered windowsill with frost patterns, and giving the kitten a tiny knitted winter hat with a pom-pom.

Change the color scheme to a warm, golden hour aesthetic by adding soft, golden light to the scene, making the walls glow with a warm amber hue, and enhancing the lampshade to emit a soft golden glow.
Convert the black and white cityscape photos on the wall into vibrant color versions, maintaining the same composition and framing.
Change the coat's pattern to a sleek, modern geometric design in monochrome black and white, while keeping the robe's silhouette and the woman's pose unchanged.
Change the light blue dress to a vibrant red with gold embroidery and add a flowing, silky texture to the fabric.
Change the color scheme to a vibrant, high-contrast neon aesthetic with glowing edges on the objects, making the green bag appear electric and the contents emit a soft bioluminescent light.
Change the lampshade to a vibrant red color while keeping the pleated texture and the teal glass base unchanged.

text: Change the sofa fabric to a shimmering, metallic silver material with a brushed metal texture, while keeping the same shape and structure.

demos.text: Transform the image into a dramatic black and white composition with high contrast, emphasizing the intensity of the players' expressions and the dynamic action on the court.
Change the desert landscape background to a lush tropical rainforest with palm trees and a waterfall, while keeping the wedding setup in the foreground.
Change the color of the Jeep from silver to a vibrant matte red, and replace the "For Sale" sign on the windshield with a custom "Off-Road Adventure" sticker.
Transform the room into a cozy reading nook by adding a plush armchair, a small side table with a lamp, and a bookshelf filled with books against the wall near the window.
Change the color scheme to a dark mode theme, making the background black and the graph elements white and light blue for better visibility and modern aesthetic.
Convert the image to a vibrant color palette, replacing the black and white tones with a metallic silver motorcycle, a deep blue background, and neon blue highlights on the engine and wheels.
Change the paper fire truck craft into a 3D cartoon version with exaggerated features, adding glowing red lights on the roof and making the wheels spin with motion blur.
Convert the image to a vibrant color palette, changing the gloves to red and white striped, while keeping the background and clothing in grayscale.

text: Change the color scheme to a vibrant summer palette, transforming the white t-shirt to bright yellow, the beige to coral, and the red to a deep teal, while maintaining the same lighting and shadows.

demos.text: Transform the scene into a surreal winter landscape by covering the weeping willow and surrounding ground in thick snow, adding falling snowflakes, and changing the sky to a soft, overcast gray with a hint of twilight.
Transform the image into a dramatic, high-contrast black and white portrait with a vintage film grain effect, enhancing the texture of the suit and the folds of the Turkish flag in the background.
Change the color scheme from blue to warm orange and yellow tones, making the entire advertisement feel like it's glowing with heat instead of cold relief.
Transform the university emblem into a metallic silver and blue color scheme with a brushed metal texture, while keeping the flame and text in their original colors.
Change the loafer style to a classic black leather Oxford shoe with brogue detailing and a wingtip design.

Transform the scene into a vibrant summer afternoon by changing the lighting to bright, warm sunlight filtering through the trees, removing the fog, and making the green foliage and purple flowers appear more vivid and saturated.
Transform the framed city map into a vibrant watercolor painting with soft blues, greens, and earth tones, while keeping the black frame and white matting.
Change the scene to a rainy, overcast day with wet pavement reflecting the motorcycle's headlights, adding visible raindrops on the camera lens and helmet visor.

text: Transform the dish into a vibrant anime-style illustration, emphasizing bold outlines, saturated colors, and a dynamic, slightly exaggerated composition while keeping the food's essential form recognizable.

demos.text: Change the unicorn piñata to have a metallic silver body with glowing neon pink and blue accents on its mane, tail, and horn, giving it a futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic.
Change the shirt to a vibrant red color with a subtle satin sheen, while keeping the pocket and button details the same.
Change the background from solid teal to a textured parchment paper with subtle vintage film grain and faint watercolor splashes in earthy tones.

Transform the colorful explosion into a swirling tornado of vibrant, luminous butterflies that emerge from the hand, with delicate wings glowing in soft pastel hues and leaving trails of shimmering dust.
Change the baseball-themed wallet to have a sleek, modern design with a smooth black leather texture and a minimalist silver logo.
Transform the LEGO set into a vibrant, glowing nighttime scene with bioluminescent green plants and purple platforms, adding a soft misty fog and a starry sky background.

Change the lighting of the entire image to a dramatic nighttime scene with golden ambient lighting highlighting the Capitol building and casting long shadows, while keeping the photos and text visible.
Change the lighting to a warm golden hour glow, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the camera gear and padded case.

text: Change the robot's eyes from green to glowing red, and add subtle sparks and smoke effects around its joints to make it look like it's overheating during a battle.

demos.text: Change the luggage set to have a vibrant red color with a glossy finish, while keeping the same design and rolling wheels.
Change the lighting to a moonlit night scene, transforming the warm sunset glow into cool blue and silver moonlight that reflects off the water and highlights the fox's fur.

Transform the dish into a whimsical, steampunk-inspired culinary creation by replacing the mushrooms with intricate brass gears and cogs, and changing the gnocchi to polished copper spheres, while keeping the parsley and cheese as-is.
Change the color scheme from beige and muted earth tones to a vibrant neon palette with glowing green, electric blue, and hot pink accents on the text and connecting lines.
Change the scene to a winter setting by adding snow on the ground, on the awning, and on the potted plants, with people wearing heavy coats and scarves, and breath visible in the air.
Change the car to a vibrant red color while keeping the black wheels and body details the same.

Convert the image to a vibrant color palette, replacing the black and white tones with rich autumn colors - the trees should be in shades of burnt orange and deep red, the grass a golden yellow, and the sky a soft pastel blue. The railroad tracks should remain metallic gray to contrast with the warm surroundings.
Change the food truck's color from white to a vibrant tropical green with yellow accents, and replace the "LA FRONTERA" sign with a new sign that reads "TROPICAL BITE" in bold, stylized font.

text: Change the product packaging to a sleek, modern glass bottle with a metallic silver dropper cap, replacing the current cardboard tube with a minimalist white background and soft lighting.

demos.text: Change the couple's traditional wedding attire to modern, elegant evening wear—replace the lehenga and sherwani with a sleek black tuxedo and a form-fitting champagne-colored gown—while maintaining the romantic pose and golden hour lighting.
Change the entire image to a watercolor painting style, making the products appear as if painted with soft, blended watercolor washes while keeping the text and layout intact.
Change the wooden coffee table to a sleek, modern glass-top table with a black metal frame, while keeping the rest of the living room unchanged.
Change the red watering can to a glowing blue holographic fountain that projects a miniature water feature into the city skyline.
Change the color scheme to a monochromatic blue and white palette, making the pie bars and ice cream appear in shades of blue, while keeping the background and text in grayscale.
Change the building's exterior to a warm, golden stone material with a sunlit glow, transforming it into a luxurious residential tower at sunset.
Change the metallic finish from gold to polished silver, enhancing the contrast between the raised details and the dark background for a more modern, cool-toned appearance.

Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and a pastel color palette that highlights the children's red helmets and harnesses against the wooden structure and green trees.

text: Change the exterior facade of the Louis Vuitton store to have a shimmering, iridescent glass surface that shifts colors like a soap bubble, while keeping the interior and people unchanged.

demos.text: Convert the image to a vibrant watercolor style, enhancing the yellow and pink hues with soft, blended edges and a painterly texture while maintaining the legibility of the text and musical elements.

Transform the rocket illustration into a retro 1950s science fiction style, with a hand-drawn, linocut-like texture and a limited color palette of navy blue, mustard yellow, and burnt orange, adding subtle grain and halftone patterns.
Change the tennis court to a neon-lit cyberpunk style with glowing orange lines and holographic elements, while keeping the players and their actions the same.
Change the woman's blue tank top to a vibrant red one, while keeping the rest of the scene unchanged.
Change the color scheme from soft mint green and white to a deep navy blue and gold, giving the resume a luxurious and sophisticated appearance.
Transform the wooden stacking toy into a glowing, bioluminescent version with soft, radiant colors that emit light, set against a dark, starry night background.
Change the yellow flower brooch to a deep red color while keeping the same fabric texture and hexagonal white button, and replace the white flowers in the background with soft pink roses.
Change the blue and white watch strap to a brown leather strap with visible stitching.

text: Change the color scheme to a monochromatic blue palette, making all characters and background elements appear in shades of blue, while keeping the yellow and red text of the title and logo.

demos.text: Change the car's color from black to metallic silver with blue-tinted headlights and replace the interior with a vibrant red leather.
Change the woman's brown leather vest to a flowing white lace dress with a V-neckline, keeping the same pose and background.
Transform the image into a monochromatic sepia tone, removing all color except for the glowing orange highlights on the armor and weapons, creating a dramatic, vintage war photography effect.
Change the navigation display to show a futuristic, holographic interface with neon blue and purple lighting, and replace the road with a glowing, cyberpunk-style highway.
Change the basketball game to take place at night under bright stadium lights, with a darkened gymnasium background and glowing reflections on the polished court.

Transform the shower enclosure into a luxurious spa experience by adding soft, warm ambient lighting from within the shower walls, changing the glass to a frosted texture, and replacing the floor with polished marble tiles.
Transform the scene into a surreal, dreamlike atmosphere by changing the water to a shimmering, iridescent purple and adding glowing, bioluminescent particles floating around the men and the boat.

Change the color scheme to a warm sunset palette, making the sky a gradient of orange and pink, the mountains a deep purple, and the desert sand a rich golden hue, while keeping the white path and cacti in their original colors.

text: Change the t-shirt from black to white, and alter the turtle and text colors to match a pastel color scheme with soft mint green, pale yellow, and light blue.

demos.text: Change the color scheme from cool blue to warm orange and red tones, making the sky a fiery sunset and the snow glow with an intense orange light, while keeping the same scene composition.
Change the background from solid yellow to a whimsical candy shop interior with shelves of colorful sweets and soft, glowing lights.

Change the lighting to a bright, sunny daytime scene with natural light coming from the left, making the paper and burger wrapper appear as if illuminated by sunlight, while keeping all other elements the same.
Transform the image into a vibrant oil painting style, emphasizing rich textures and bold brushstrokes while maintaining the natural colors of the fresh salad and tomatoes.
Change the blue crocheted teddy bear to be made of shiny, metallic silver yarn with a reflective surface, while keeping the same pose and bow.
Change the color scheme to a monochromatic green palette, making all the jerseys and the field a varying shade of green while keeping the white line and text visible.
Change the car's color from green to a metallic silver with blue glowing headlights and add a futuristic neon underglow.
Change the artistic style to a watercolor painting effect, softening the edges and blending the colors of the flowers and cards while maintaining the text and overall composition.

text: Transform the bathroom into a luxurious jungle retreat by replacing the window view with a dense tropical rainforest, adding ambient glow from bioluminescent plants, and changing the marble floor to a polished teak wood texture.

demos.text: Transform the image into a dramatic oil painting style with rich, textured brushstrokes and enhanced lighting, emphasizing the intensity of the basketball play.
Change the color of the house from red to a deep forest green, and replace the sky with a dramatic sunset featuring orange, purple, and pink hues.
Change the color of the handbag to a deep, matte burgundy and replace the gold hardware with silver-toned metal accents.
Change the blue pool table felt to a vibrant green, and replace the orange rug with a patterned gray and black rug.
Transform the scene into a vintage sepia tone with a film grain effect, making it look like an old photograph from the 1950s.

Change the artistic style to a vibrant watercolor painting, enhancing the colors of the woman's dress and the surrounding forest with soft, blended hues while maintaining the architectural structure of the cave.
Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting, softening the edges of the buildings and fountain while enhancing the sky with blended washes of blue and white.
Change the blue wall to a warm, sunlit beige color and replace the dark wood TV stand with a light-colored, minimalist white furniture piece.

text: Change the ring's metal from white gold to rose gold, and add a soft, warm golden glow to the lighting to enhance the romantic atmosphere.

demos.text: Change the white tank top to a sleeveless red dress with a high neckline and a subtle floral pattern on the front.
Change the newspaper's headline and article text to a different language, such as Japanese, while keeping the layout and image of the building unchanged.
Change the color scheme of the TV screen's interface from dark blue to a vibrant neon green, making the menu text and icons glow with a bright green light while keeping the background dark.

Transform the scene into a dramatic winter landscape by covering the mountains and valley in thick snow, changing the green meadows to snow-covered fields, and replacing the blue sky with a gray, overcast winter sky.

Transform the image into a watercolor painting style, preserving the woman's features and expression while rendering the background foliage and her clothing with soft, blended watercolor textures and visible brushstrokes.
Change the wooden sign to have a distressed, weathered look with chipped red paint and white lettering that appears faded and slightly peeling, as if it has been exposed to the elements for years.
Change the player's uniform to a retro 1970s Baltimore Colts design, keeping the same pose and background.
Transform the scene into a vibrant autumn setting by changing the foliage on the trees and hillsides to rich shades of red, orange, and yellow, while keeping the architecture and bridge unchanged.

text: Change the color of the art gel from neon red to metallic gold, and adjust the lighting to create a luxurious, reflective glow on the surface of the gel and the container.

demos.text: Change the color scheme to a metallic silver and dark gray with subtle blue lighting accents on the straps and pouches.
Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style while maintaining the camera's structure and details.
Change the leather recliner to a plush, oversized armchair upholstered in deep forest green velvet with gold piping and matching throw pillows.
Transform the image into a dramatic oil painting style with rich, textured brushstrokes and deep, saturated colors, emphasizing the contrast between the bride's white dress and the vibrant bouquet.
Change the wooden sideboard to have a dark, glossy black finish with metallic silver handles.
Change the background of both images to a lush, green garden with blooming roses and a stone archway, while keeping the couple in the same pose.
Change the woman's plain t-shirt to a vibrant, colorful graphic tee with a retro design.
Transform the scene into a vibrant autumn landscape by changing the bare trees to fiery red, orange, and yellow foliage, while keeping the red chairlifts and snowy ground for contrast.

text: Change the poster's artistic style from a high-contrast blue and white stencil to a soft watercolor effect with blended blues and creams, while keeping the two figures and text clearly visible.

demos.text: Change the scene to a rainy evening, with wet dirt roads reflecting the dim glow of streetlights, dark storm clouds gathering overhead, and houses showing warm interior lights through their windows.

Transform the scene into a vibrant autumn setting by enhancing the colors of the fallen leaves to rich shades of red, orange, and gold, while keeping the evergreen trees and bare branches in their natural tones. Add a soft golden sunlight filtering through the mist.

Convert the image to a vibrant daytime scene with full color, replacing the sepia tone with natural daylight. Change the clothing of the pedestrians to early 20th-century styles, and add a classic automobile parked on the street instead of the carriage.
Change the color scheme from beige and gold to a vibrant neon cyberpunk style with glowing purple and blue accents, while keeping all text and layout elements intact.
Change the scene to a rainy afternoon with soft gray lighting, add water droplets on the basket and leaves, and replace the bright white flowers with dark purple blossoms.
Change the app interface to a futuristic cyberpunk style with neon blue and purple glowing elements, holographic text, and a dark, rain-slicked cityscape background visible through the phone screen.
Change the tea set to a vibrant cobalt blue ceramic with intricate gold detailing, creating a luxurious and regal appearance.

Convert the technical diagram into a vibrant watercolor illustration, maintaining all original labels and numbers while replacing the black-and-white line art with soft, blended watercolor washes in shades of blue, green, and cream.

text: Change the woman's expression to a wide, joyful smile while keeping her hands in the same position, and transform the green apple into a glowing, neon yellow orb.

demos.text: Change the sneakers to a metallic silver finish with a reflective surface, while keeping the same design and proportions. The concrete block should remain unchanged.
Change the lighting to a warm golden hour glow, making the room feel like it's illuminated by late afternoon sun. Add soft shadows and a subtle warmth to the white walls and bedding.
Transform the scene into a vibrant autumn sunset, changing the overcast sky to warm hues of orange and pink, illuminating the forest with golden light and enhancing the fall colors of the leaves.
Change the color scheme from pink with gold dots to a vibrant green with silver polka dots, keeping the same pattern and layout.

Change the color scheme to a festive red and gold palette, replacing the blue ornament with a deep red one and adjusting the other ornaments to feature more red accents while keeping the gold ribbons.
Change the color scheme to a monochromatic blue and white palette, replacing the red elements with shades of blue while keeping the overall design and text intact.
Change the fried chicken nuggets to golden-brown, crispy fried pickles with a tangy green pickle color visible in the center, keeping the ketchup sauce and white plate.
Change the book cover to have a watercolor texture, making the teal background appear as if painted with soft, blended watercolor washes, while keeping the text and speech bubbles clearly legible.

text: Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, softening the edges of the daisies and blending the background colors with painterly strokes while preserving the delicate white petals and yellow centers.

demos.text: Transform the political pin collection into a vibrant watercolor painting, with soft, blended brushstrokes and a dreamy, impressionistic style, while maintaining the overall layout and subject matter.
Convert the sketch into a vibrant digital art style with glowing neon lines in electric blue and hot pink, set against a dark cosmic background with star particles.
Change the lighting to a cool, moonlit blue tone, making the kitchen appear as if it's illuminated by natural moonlight during a clear night.

Change the color scheme to a warm, golden sunset palette, replacing the cool purples and blues with glowing oranges, yellows, and deep reds to create a dramatic contrast between the fiery sky and the snow-covered battlefield.
Change the keychain's pattern from cow print to a vibrant tropical leaf design with green and yellow hues, while keeping the leather texture and stitching.
Transform the engine block into a glowing steampunk artifact with intricate brass piping and warm, bioluminescent amber lights emanating from its core components.

Change the color scheme from vibrant tropical red to a soft pastel palette, replacing the red background with a light mint green, the blue hibiscus flowers with pale lavender, and the yellow flowers with soft peach, while keeping the green leaves in a muted sage tone.

Transform the dining room into a futuristic, minimalist space by replacing the ornate wooden furniture with sleek, transparent acrylic tables and chairs, changing the marble floor to a polished black glass with embedded LED lighting, and replacing the heavy drapes and chandelier with clean, geometric light fixtures and smart glass windows.

text: Change the color scheme from green and white to a vibrant purple and gold gradient, keeping all text and logos intact.

demos.text: Change the chef's uniform to a traditional Japanese kimono with a white obi, while keeping the tall white hat and the kitchen setting.
Change the black Bentley to a vibrant red color while keeping all other details the same.
Change the lighting to a dramatic chiaroscuro style with deep shadows and strong highlights, creating a Renaissance painting effect.
Transform the scene into a vibrant, sun-drenched summer day with golden sunlight illuminating the castle and vineyards, replacing the overcast sky with a bright blue sky and fluffy white clouds.
Change the man's outfit to a classic magician's suit with a black top hat and a red bow tie.
Transform the scene into a vibrant autumn setting by changing the bare tree's branches to display golden and orange foliage, and add scattered fallen leaves on the ground.
Change the bus's livery to a vibrant tropical theme with palm trees, coconuts, and ocean waves in shades of turquoise and coral.
Change the color scheme to a warm, sunset lighting effect, making the entire scene glow with golden and orange tones, while keeping the wooden frame and cactus details intact.

text: Change the shoe's color scheme to a vibrant red and gold gradient, maintaining the original texture and structure, with the "sta smith" branding highlighted in gold.

demos.text: Transform the yellow Game Boy and blue controller into a glowing neon version, with bright neon yellow and blue lights outlining the devices and illuminating the surrounding area, set against a dark, starry night background.

Transform the scene into a dramatic nighttime setting with neon lighting, changing the car's body to a vibrant metallic red and the showroom floor to a reflective wet asphalt surface with glowing blue and purple neon lines.
Change the color scheme to a vibrant blue and gold, maintaining the distressed texture and split composition, to represent the University of Texas and the University of Alabama's rival colors.
Change the woman's bright yellow coat to a deep emerald green wool coat with a high collar and large lapels, while keeping the rest of her outfit and the background unchanged.
Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and expressive brushstrokes that capture the motion of the wave and surfer.
Change the movie scene on the TV screen to a peaceful beach sunset with palm trees and gentle waves, while keeping the viewers and room unchanged.

Change the color scheme from monochrome sepia to a vibrant watercolor style, with soft blue and green hues blending into the background and outlines, while keeping the main text and header designs legible.
Change the green garden hose to a metallic silver one with a brushed metal texture, while keeping the coiled shape and gray connectors.

text: Change the dog's fur to a shimmering, metallic gold that reflects light like polished metal, while keeping the water splashing and background natural.

demos.text: Change the lighting to a warm golden hour glow, making the DJ controller appear as if it's sitting on a beach during sunset with soft waves in the background.
Transform the scene into a vibrant autumn setting by changing the foliage to golden yellow and orange leaves, replacing the green forest with autumn trees, and adding fallen leaves on the ground.
Convert the image to a dramatic oil painting style with thick, visible brushstrokes and rich, dark tones, emphasizing the contrast between the subject and the background.
Transform the scene into a nighttime setting with a full moon casting soft, silvery light on the tree and fallen leaves, adding a mystical glow to the autumn landscape.
Change the storefront sign to read "CARPE DIEM" in the same blue font and style, while keeping the rest of the image unchanged.
Change the color of the car from teal to a vibrant red, and adjust the lighting to make it appear as if it's sunset, with warm golden light reflecting off the car's surface.

Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, diffused edges and splashes of warm orange and pink hues blending into the background, while maintaining the anatomical details of the figures.
Transform the scene into a surreal winter wonderland by changing the sky to a vibrant aurora borealis with swirling green and purple lights, while keeping the sled dogs and musher in sharp focus.

text: Change the color scheme to a dark, moody night scene with deep purples and blacks, adding glowing neon blue accents to the Doraemon figures and the remote control to create a cyberpunk aesthetic.

demos.text: Change the creature's red spikes to glowing blue bioluminescent tendrils that pulse with light, and replace the snowy landscape with a dark, alien jungle with bioluminescent plants.
Change the brown coat to a long, flowing red woolen coat with a high collar and large buttons.
Convert the kitchen scene into a vibrant watercolor painting style, preserving the composition and key elements like the colorful abstract artwork, pendant lights, and bread on the counter.
Change the man's clothing to a vintage-style brown leather jacket with a high collar, while keeping his posture and the background the same.
Change the black electric guitar to a vibrant red color while keeping all other elements the same.
Change the scene from a bright sunny day to a dramatic nighttime race under artificial lights, with glowing bicycle wheels and a misty atmosphere.
Change the color scheme to a vibrant sunset theme, making the blue background a warm orange gradient, the white areas a soft peach, and the text and logo in deep golden yellow.
Transform the car interior into a cozy camping trailer with soft lighting, adding a small portable stove, a foldable table, and a sleeping bag on the floor, while keeping the original layout.

text: Change the color scheme from black and white to a soft pastel palette, with light pink hair, a pale yellow dress, and a mint green background.

demos.text: Change the scene to a vibrant sunset, with warm golden and orange hues reflecting on the water, and add a flock of seagulls flying in the sky.
Transform the scene into a vibrant autumn setting by changing the grass to golden yellow and the tree leaves to fiery red and orange, while maintaining the foggy atmosphere and canal reflection.
Change the scene to a futuristic city with flying cars and holographic advertisements, while keeping the same street layout and buildings.
Change the red Jeep to a bright yellow color while maintaining all other elements of the scene.
Convert the image to a vibrant watercolor style, enhancing the yellow and pink hues with soft, blended edges and a painterly texture while maintaining the legibility of the text and musical elements.
Convert the image to a vibrant color palette, enhancing the background to a warm sunset scene with golden light streaming through large windows, while maintaining the subjects' expressions and poses.
Change the man's camera to a vintage film camera with a large lens and viewfinder, and add a film roll peeking out from the back, while keeping the scene in the forest.
Change the color scheme from beige and brown to a vibrant gradient of electric blue and neon purple, making the text and diagram pop with a futuristic digital glow.

text: Change the dominant color scheme from blue and orange to green and gold, making the jerseys appear as if they belong to a different team.

demos.text: Change the color scheme to a monochromatic blue palette, transforming the green tablecloth, orange sofa, and artwork into various shades of blue while keeping the lighting and structure the same.

Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, enhancing the colors of the hat feathers to bright emerald green and deep sapphire blue, while softening the edges and adding visible brushstrokes throughout the composition.
Transform the image into a nighttime scene with a full moon, adding soft moonlight that illuminates the couple and the vineyard, creating long shadows and a dreamy, romantic atmosphere.

Transform the hallway into a winter scene by adding a layer of snow on the floor and dusting the walls and doors with snow, while keeping the warm sunlight and green stained glass window as the focal point.
Convert the entire collage into a vintage film photograph style with warm sepia tones, grainy texture, and slightly faded edges to give it a nostalgic, old-school photo album feel.
Change the sippy cup to have a vibrant rainbow color gradient on the body, with the letter A remaining black, while keeping the pink base, handles, and gray lid in their original colors.
Convert the scene to a vibrant watercolor painting style, enhancing the colors of the buildings and foliage while maintaining the cobblestone texture and overall composition.
Change the color scheme to a vibrant, high-contrast neon aesthetic with glowing edges on the objects, making the green bag appear electric and the contents emit a soft bioluminescent light.

text: Change the man's blue button-down shirt to a white lab coat with a name tag.

demos.text: Change the lighting to a dramatic sunrise glow, casting warm orange and pink hues across the garage, with long shadows and a soft glow on the car's body.
Change the man's clothing to a 1920s-style suit with a bowler hat and cane, while keeping the museum setting and his cheerful expression.
Change the color scheme to a vibrant sunset palette, replacing the gloomy teal and gray tones with warm oranges, reds, and golden yellows, while keeping the ominous atmosphere.
Change the light switch to a vintage brass toggle switch with a worn patina, while keeping the same wall and window background.

Transform the scene into a cozy winter morning by adding a light dusting of snow on the wooden tray, a soft layer of frost on the glass table, and a warm, glowing light as if coming from a nearby fireplace.
Change the fish to a golden, metallic version with a reflective surface, making it look like a decorative sculpture while keeping the rest of the meal and setting the same.

Convert the entire scientific figure into a vibrant watercolor painting style, maintaining the layout and labels but replacing the sharp data points and text with soft, blended brushstrokes and a palette of pastel colors.

Transform the dinosaur toy storage container into a vibrant, glowing neon sign version, with the label's text and dinosaur illustrations illuminated in bright neon colors like electric blue, hot pink, and lime green, while keeping the container's shape and structure intact.

text: Change the ring's metal from yellow gold to polished platinum while keeping the same intricate design and diamond placement.

demos.text: Transform the sauna interior into a futuristic, cyberpunk-inspired space by replacing the wooden walls and benches with glowing, metallic panels in neon blue and purple, adding holographic interface elements and ambient light strips along the edges.

Change the invitation text to a fictional medieval fantasy wedding with names like "Elara Moonshadow" and "Sir Thorne Ironwood," and replace the modern location with a fantastical realm such as "The Elven Glade of Aelindor." Update the font to an ornate, gothic medieval script and add a subtle glowing effect to the text and crest.

Convert the scientific chemical diagrams and text into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft blended colors for the molecules and a dreamy, artistic background that retains the legibility of the text and structures.
Change the yellow sports car to a matte black finish with red brake calipers, and add a subtle rain effect with wet reflections on the pavement.
Change the red patio umbrella to a vibrant blue color while keeping the rest of the scene the same.
Transform the image into a dramatic oil painting style with rich, impasto brushstrokes and deep, glowing colors, emphasizing the texture of the fabric and the golden deity.
Change the backpack's color to vibrant red with black accents, while keeping the same design and hydration system.
Change the woman's pink off-the-shoulder romper to a vibrant red version with the same smocked and ruffled details, while keeping the blue choker and silver phone.

text: Change the storefront sign to feature a whimsical, hand-drawn style with pastel colors and playful lettering, while keeping the building's architecture and interior lighting unchanged.

demos.text: Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting style, blending soft, flowing colors and visible brushstrokes while preserving the cake's intricate details and the floral patterns on the plate.
Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting style, softening the edges of the motorcycle and graffiti while enhancing the fluid blending of colors in the background.
Change the background to a dark, stormy night sky with lightning bolts illuminating the scene, while keeping the skull and floral crown in the foreground.
Transform the technical diagram into a vibrant, neon-lit circuit board design with glowing blue and purple lines connecting the components, giving it a futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic.
Transform the scene into a rainy night, with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights and a soft mist hanging in the air, enhancing the vibrant glow of the signs.
Change the volleyball to a glowing, ethereal orb that emits soft light, while keeping the player's pose and the dramatic spotlight effect.
Transform the image into a nighttime scene with glowing bioluminescent plants and lanterns, replacing the bright daylight with a soft, magical blue and purple ambient light.

Transform the scene into a dramatic nighttime setting with moonlight casting soft shadows, add glowing fairy lights wrapped around the railing and potted plant, and change the flowers to bioluminescent blue blooms.

text: Change the red double-decker bus to a vintage green steam-powered bus with large wheels and a smokestack, maintaining the rainy London street scene.

demos.text: Transform the scene into a futuristic underwater observation deck by changing the ocean view outside the glass to a vibrant coral reef with swimming fish, while keeping the concrete interior structure intact.
Change the salad to a creamy pasta dish with al dente spaghetti, cherry tomatoes, and grated Parmesan cheese, while keeping the lighting and blue checkered tablecloth.

Convert the black and white historical photograph into a vibrant, full-color image with a warm golden-hour lighting, giving the scene a rich, cinematic feel while maintaining the original composition and details.
Change the lighting to a warm, golden hour glow, making the wooden staircase and floor appear sun-kissed and casting long, soft shadows across the room.
Change the scene to a snowy winter landscape with snow-covered grass and distant mountains, while keeping the person and their traditional clothing the same.
Transform the engine bay into a glowing neon-lit cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant blue and purple neon accents highlighting the engine components and wiring.
Transform the image into a vibrant color palette, giving the rocky surface a reddish Martian hue with a soft blue sky and distant dust haze, enhancing the alien atmosphere.

Transform the scene into a surreal, dreamlike landscape by changing the sunset to a vibrant purple and pink gradient, adding glowing bioluminescent patterns in the wet sand, and replacing the distant hills with floating, translucent islands.

text: Transform the topographic map into a vibrant watercolor painting style, blending the green terrain with soft blues and earthy tones, while keeping all geographic details clearly visible.

demos.text: Change the metallic texture to a glowing, bioluminescent blue-green hue, making the pendants appear to emit a soft, ethereal light from within.

Change the building's color scheme from pink to a soft pastel blue, with matching blue trim around the windows and door. Replace the green ivy on the right with a climbing plant featuring light purple blossoms.

Convert the image to a vibrant watercolor style, maintaining the subject and composition but replacing the monochromatic tones with soft, blended hues of deep blue, burnt orange, and muted gold to evoke a warm, dreamlike atmosphere.
Change the sunny daytime scene to a dramatic nighttime setting with moody blue lighting and glowing street lamps, while keeping the main subject and background elements recognizable.
Change the dark gray suit trousers to a vibrant red wool texture, while keeping the navy blue shirt and black dress shoes unchanged.

Transform the scene into a whimsical winter wonderland by changing the autumn leaves and pumpkins to snow-covered evergreen branches and icy blue pumpkins, replacing the warm lighting with soft moonlight, and adding a light dusting of snow on the table.
Transform the image into a vintage-style product photograph with warm, sepia-toned lighting and a slight film grain effect, giving it the look of a 1950s apothecary advertisement.
Change the dog's blue party hat with white polka dots to a red and white striped Santa hat with a fluffy white pom-pom.

text: Change the lighting to a warm, golden hour glow, casting long shadows and highlighting the vintage car's polished black surface.

demos.text: Change the white peony to a vibrant red peony with deep crimson petals and golden-yellow stamens, while keeping the hand and background unchanged.
Transform the image into a vibrant, sun-drenched tropical scene with bright blue skies, golden sand, and turquoise water, while keeping the couple's romantic pose intact.
Change the woman's white t-shirt to a vibrant red sleeveless top with a subtle geometric pattern.
Change the woman's navy blue dress to a flowing white silk gown with lace detailing, and transform the background into a sunlit garden with blooming roses and a stone fountain.
Transform the image into a watercolor painting style, softening the edges and blending the colors of the woman's hair, skin, and clothing into gentle washes while preserving the quote overlay.

Transform the scene into a vibrant, sun-drenched afternoon by changing the lighting to bright daylight, shifting the sky to a clear blue with fluffy white clouds, and enhancing the colors of the plants and cushions to be more saturated.
Change the pattern on the pouch to a vibrant tropical leaf design in shades of green, yellow, and red, while keeping the navy blue pom-pom and zipper.
Change the background from a solid green to a dynamic nighttime scene of Hogwarts Castle with glowing windows, flying owls, and mist rising from the lake.

text: Transform the image into a watercolor painting style, softening the edges and blending the colors of the floral patterns and fabric textures while maintaining the composition and details of the face masks and pillow.

demos.text: Change the suit to a vibrant red color while maintaining the same fabric texture and lighting, and replace the gold buttons with silver ones.
Change the boat's color scheme from blue and white to a vibrant red and white, making it stand out against the water and sky.
Change the football's surface texture to resemble brushed metal with a chrome finish, while keeping the FC Barcelona and Nike logos intact.
Change the earrings to have a gold metal frame instead of black, while keeping the red stones and overall design intact.
Change the icy tunnel scene to a lush green forest path with sunlight filtering through the trees, while keeping the person and the cobblestone path.
Transform the image into a dramatic black and white scene with high contrast, emphasizing the silhouette of the performer and the crowd against the bright stage lights.
Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting, with soft, blended colors and visible brushstroke textures, while maintaining the architectural details of the house and the landscape.
Change the man's outfit to a futuristic, high-tech jumpsuit with glowing blue accents along the seams and a holographic display on the chest.

text: Change the color scheme to a vibrant neon gradient, making the sports bra and leggings glow with electric blue and hot pink hues, while keeping the hangers and rod in their original wood tone.

demos.text: Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended colors and visible brushstrokes, while keeping the man's distressed expression and the "GREEN HELL" text clearly legible.
Change the scene on the tablet to a nighttime forest with a full moon, glowing fireflies, and a raccoon instead of the bear.

Transform the classroom into a futuristic laboratory by replacing the desks and chairs with sleek, high-tech workstations featuring embedded holographic displays and changing the wall tiles to a smooth, metallic finish.
Change the lighting to midday sunlight, making the sky bright blue and the snow on the mountains appear white and vibrant, while keeping the warm interior lights of the cabins visible.

Change the scene to a futuristic setting where the couple is reviewing photos on a holographic laptop with floating digital interfaces, and the camera transforms into a sleek, transparent device with glowing blue energy lines.

Change the warm wooden tones of the lobby to a cool, futuristic aesthetic with metallic silver and translucent blue lighting, transforming the reception desk and ceiling fixtures into glowing, illuminated panels.

Transform the car's interior into a futuristic cyberpunk style, replacing the wood trim with glowing neon blue and purple circuit patterns, changing the leather seats to reflective black synthetic material with integrated light strips, and making the dashboard display emit a holographic green interface.

Transform the gold and blue gemstone bracelet into a delicate watercolor painting with soft, blended edges and a dreamy, ethereal quality, while preserving the gemstone shapes and gold setting details.

text: Change the color scheme to a metallic silver and deep navy blue, making the dollar bill and certificate appear as if they are made of polished metal with a cool, reflective finish.

demos.text: Transform the scene into a vibrant, sun-drenched afternoon by enhancing the sunlight, making the red carpet glow, and adding lens flares and long shadows, while keeping the building and figures intact.
Change the color scheme of the left "PACKAGES" flyer to a monochromatic black and white, while keeping the right "PRINTS" flyer in full color.
Transform the image into a vintage black-and-white photograph with a soft focus effect, giving it the appearance of a 1950s wedding portrait.
Color the illustration with soft pastel shades, using light pink for the dress, pale yellow for the flower crown, and a gentle lavender for the heart accents, while keeping the black line art intact.
Transform the scene into a vintage vinyl record cover style, with warm golden lighting, film grain texture, and a retro color palette dominated by sepia and burnt orange tones.

Change the scene to a vibrant sunset, with warm orange and pink hues illuminating the station canopy and reflecting off the train's surface, while the man's silhouette is highlighted against the glowing sky.

Transform the image into a dramatic night scene with a full moon casting silvery light over the wave, changing the water to deep indigo and adding bioluminescent particles glowing in the crest and foam.

Transform the scene into a dramatic nighttime setting with a deep blue twilight sky, add warm glowing lights from the house's interior and outdoor lamps, and create soft reflections of the lights on the pool surface.

text: Convert the poster into a vibrant watercolor painting style, enhancing the colors of the mountains, sky, and clothing while maintaining the original composition and text.

demos.text: Change the color of the large red sculpture to a glowing blue, matching the cool tones of the evening sky, while keeping its shape and position.
Convert the architectural floor plan into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft blue and green washes filling the rooms and warm brown tones for the walls and furniture outlines.
Change the red liquid oozing from the porthole to a glowing golden liquid that flows like molten gold, maintaining the dripping effect.
Change the color scheme from dark red and black to a bright, futuristic neon green and black, making the cables glow with an intense bioluminescent effect.
Change the car's color from red to metallic silver while keeping the same glossy finish and lighting conditions.
Transform the candles into glowing lanterns with a warm, ethereal light emanating from within, casting soft shadows on the surface and creating a magical nighttime ambiance.
Change the backpack's camouflage pattern to a vibrant tropical leaf pattern with green, yellow, and red hues, while keeping the same structure and straps.
Change the color scheme to a vibrant, retro 1970s style with mustard yellow walls, burnt orange floor, and dark teal furniture.

text: Change the cardboard sign to a shiny, metallic silver surface with the text "iPhone 12" in bold, futuristic blue font and a glowing neon smiley face.

demos.text: Transform the image into a dynamic oil painting style, enhancing the brushstrokes and adding visible texture to the armor and landscape, while maintaining the original composition and vibrant colors.
Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, softening the edges of the fish fins and creating gentle color blending in the background.
Convert the image to a vibrant watercolor painting style, enhancing the glowing lights of the city with soft, blended brushstrokes and a dreamy, ethereal atmosphere.
Change the floral design on the cup from poppies to a pattern of blue butterflies with white wings, keeping the same white background and overall composition.

Transform the industrial compressor system into a steampunk version, replacing the modern control panel with brass gauges and levers, adding ornate copper piping with visible steam vents, and giving the motor a vintage, riveted metal casing with glowing amber lights.
Change the setting to a futuristic conference room with holographic displays, glowing interfaces, and a high-tech ambiance while maintaining the man's posture and the object he's holding.

Transform the scene into a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape at night, with glowing holographic signs replacing the existing billboards, rain-slicked streets reflecting the colorful lights, and a slightly darker, more dramatic atmosphere.
Change the suitcase from bright orange to a metallic silver color with brushed aluminum texture, while keeping the black accents and overall structure.

text: Transform the burning heart into a shattered glass heart with sharp, reflective fragments, keeping the fiery glow but making it emanate from within the cracks instead of surrounding the object.

demos.text: Transform the image into a warm, vintage-style photograph with a faded color palette, soft focus, and subtle film grain, giving it the nostalgic feel of a 1970s family snapshot.
Change the navy blue beanie to a vibrant red color while keeping the same ribbed texture and leather patch details.
Convert the image to a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft edges and blended colors, while keeping the subjects and text clearly recognizable.
Change the yellow fuel pump nozzle to a futuristic glowing blue electric charging plug while keeping the car and background consistent.
Change the color scheme to a monochromatic sepia tone, enhancing the vintage and somber mood of the memorial tribute.

Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting style, softening the harsh lines of the rubble and giving the figures a painterly, translucent quality while maintaining the composition and lighting.
Change the scene to a futuristic racing environment with neon lighting, adding holographic display elements around the car and a transparent, floating track surface.
Change the lighting to a cool blue tone, making the room feel like it's illuminated by moonlight at night, while keeping the warm glow of the chandeliers.

text: Transform the bouquet into a vibrant summer arrangement by changing the pink roses to bright yellow sunflowers, keeping the daisies, and adding a few purple lavender sprigs. Change the green stems to a mix of yellow and purple, and replace the clear glass jar with a rustic woven wicker basket.

demos.text: Transform the scene into a vibrant sunset, changing the sky to warm hues of orange and pink, and casting long golden shadows across the gravel and the Jeep.
Change the storefront sign to display "DIGITAL PLUS" in a glowing retro neon style with a vibrant pink and blue gradient, while keeping the rest of the store's appearance the same.
Change the color scheme from warm orange and brown tones to cool blue and gray tones, transforming the room into a serene, moonlit evening atmosphere.

Change the color scheme of the flood response plan to a dark mode aesthetic, replacing all white and light beige backgrounds with a deep navy blue, and using bright cyan and white for text and map details. Add a subtle digital glitch effect to the edges of the paper to give it a futuristic, cyberpunk feel.
Transform the frescoes into a vibrant watercolor style, softening the edges and blending the colors while maintaining the composition and figures.
Change the color scheme to a metallic silver and deep purple gradient, with glowing purple accents on the straps and sole, giving the shoes a futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic.
Transform the scene into a dramatic, post-apocalyptic forest at sunset, with the couple illuminated by warm golden light from the horizon, casting long shadows among the burnt trees.

Change the mobile phone screen's content to display a social media feed about a music festival instead of the League of Legends website, while keeping the phone's physical appearance and the surrounding mystical background unchanged.

text: Change the background from plain gray to a traditional Japanese kitchen setting with wooden shelves, hanging pots, and soft ambient lighting.

demos.text: Change the white leather notebook to have a vibrant red leather texture with gold stitching and gold hardware accents.
Change the watch face to a vibrant turquoise color with a sunburst pattern, replace the Roman numerals with Arabic numerals, and add a small sub-dial at the 6 o'clock position showing seconds.
Change the color scheme from dark metallic to vibrant neon, making the hoses glow with electric blue and purple light against a black background.

Change the color scheme to a vibrant neon cyberpunk style, replacing the soft pastel purples with glowing electric blues, hot pinks, and neon greens, while adding digital glitch effects and holographic overlays.
Change the color of the armchair from light blue to deep forest green while keeping the same tufted design and leather texture.
Transform the image into a vintage black-and-white portrait with a soft film grain effect and subtle vignette, giving it the appearance of a 1950s studio photograph.
Change the yellow Audi to a deep forest green with a matte finish, while keeping the same lighting and urban environment.
Change the coin's color from gold to a deep, reflective black with metallic sheen, making it look like a polished obsidian coin with the same embossed details.

text: Transform the lavender field into a surreal landscape with glowing bioluminescent purple flowers that emit a soft light, while keeping the text and overall composition unchanged.

demos.text: Change the white pants to a pair of shiny, metallic silver joggers with a reflective finish, while keeping the rest of the outfit and background the same.
Change the car's exterior color from gray to a vibrant metallic red while keeping the interior and background unchanged.
Transform the wedding gown into a vibrant red satin ballgown with gold embroidery on the bodice and sleeves, set against a luxurious velvet backdrop.
Change the tortoiseshell frame to a sleek, matte black metal frame with thin wire rims, while keeping the brand name "CAZAL" visible on the lens and temple.
Change the car's color from silver to a vibrant metallic red, while keeping the autumn forest background and motion blur effect intact.
Change the background from dark gray to a soft, glowing night sky with visible stars and a faint crescent moon.

Change the color scheme of both product cans to a metallic chrome finish with reflective surfaces, while keeping the text and branding clearly legible. Add subtle light reflections on the cans to enhance the metallic effect.
Change the lighting to nighttime, making the geodesic dome glow with soft blue ambient light from within, while adding stars and a crescent moon to the sky.

text: Transform the LEGO snail into a glowing bioluminescent creature by giving it a soft blue and purple neon glow, especially along the edges of its shell and body, while keeping the background a light blue gradient.

demos.text: Change the wooden desk to have a polished black marble top and legs, with gold inlay accents on the drawers and frame, giving it a luxurious modern look.
Change the phone's screen display to show a vibrant, animated cityscape at night with glowing lights and moving vehicles.
Transform the scene into a surreal winter landscape by covering the grass and tree bases in deep snow, adding a light snowfall, and changing the sky to a pale, overcast gray.

Change the scene to a rainy afternoon with soft, diffused lighting. Add gentle raindrops falling around the ducks and make the grass appear wet and glistening. The ducklings' feathers should look slightly ruffled from the moisture.

Convert the watch into a glowing neon version, where the black dial and strap emit a vibrant blue neon glow, the white markers and hands turn into bright white neon lines, and the blue accents on the dial become intense neon blue highlights, all set against a dark background.

Change the scene to a vibrant autumn day with golden sunlight, adding fallen orange and red leaves scattered across the grass and floating in the air, while keeping the people's expressions and clothing unchanged.
Change the lighting to a dramatic red emergency light, casting a deep red glow throughout the hallway and highlighting the tactical team in a tense, high-alert atmosphere.
Change the interior color scheme from black and silver to a luxurious deep red and gold, with red leather seats and gold trim accents on the dashboard and steering wheel.

text: Change the color scheme of the gallery to a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk style, with glowing pink and blue lights illuminating the portraits and casting colorful reflections on the walls and floor.

demos.text: Change the color scheme of the bike pump from black to a metallic silver with blue accents, and apply a glossy, reflective finish to the surfaces.
Change the woman's black off-shoulder dress to a flowing red gown with gold embroidery.
Change the white pants to a pair of shiny, metallic silver joggers with a reflective finish, while keeping the rest of the outfit and background the same.
Change the gas mask to have a vibrant, iridescent finish that shifts between purple and blue hues, giving it a futuristic, cyberpunk appearance while keeping the original structure.

Transform the illuminated Christmas tree mountain into a glowing, futuristic digital landscape with neon blue and purple circuit patterns flowing across its surface, while keeping the town and night sky intact.
Change the hexagonal tile backsplash to a smooth, glossy white subway tile with thin gray grout lines.
Change the green leather bag to a vibrant red velvet clutch with gold embroidery and tassels.
Change the tractor's color scheme from white and red to a vibrant, metallic teal with gold accents on the grille and wheels, while maintaining the same vintage design and outdoor setting.

text: Change the earring design to feature a celestial theme with gold stars, crescent moons, and small planets instead of feathers and bows, while keeping the same hook style and overall structure.

demos.text: Change the faucet to a vintage brass design with a single lever handle, and replace the modern tiled backsplash with an exposed brick wall. The countertop and sink should remain the same.

Transform the dish into a vibrant watercolor painting style, softening the edges and blending the colors of the beans, banana, avocado, and greens with flowing watercolor textures while maintaining the composition.

Transform the scene into a vibrant autumn setting by changing the grass to golden-yellow, adding fallen orange and red leaves along the path, and replacing the fog with soft golden sunlight filtering through bare trees.
Transform the goggles into a futuristic cyberpunk style with glowing neon blue accents along the frame and lens edges, and add a subtle holographic display overlay on the lenses showing digital data.

Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting, softening the edges and blending the colors of the crowd and airport interior while maintaining the recognizable structure of the check-in area and the airplane outside.

Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and a palette of rich, saturated blues and earth tones, while keeping the person and the rug's intricate patterns recognizable.
Change the color scheme of the earrings to a monochromatic silver and gray palette, giving them a metallic, futuristic appearance while maintaining their layered wooden disc structure.
Transform the image into a dramatic oil painting style with rich, textured brushstrokes and deep, moody lighting, emphasizing the contrast between the bright stadium lights and the dark night sky.

text: Convert the infographic into a vintage travel poster style, using muted earth tones and sepia highlights, with hand-drawn typography and subtle paper texture overlay.

demos.text: Change the green Xbox gift card to a glowing blue credit card with a different logo, while keeping the industrial background and warm lighting.
Change the gold dog pendant to a silver version with a brushed metal texture, while keeping the chain and background unchanged.
Change the olive green fabric cover to a sleek black leather texture with visible grain and subtle stitching details.
Transform the scene into a winter wonderland by adding a thick blanket of snow covering the ground, rooftops, and car surfaces, while changing the sky to a soft, overcast gray with light snowfall.
Change the lighting to a dramatic neon cyberpunk style with vibrant purple and cyan highlights reflecting off the surfaces of the VR headset and controllers.

Convert the black and white architectural drawing into a vibrant, colorful cityscape at night, with glowing neon lights illuminating the buildings and streets, and a dark, starry sky in the background.
Change the background of the t-shirt design from a blue energy swirl to a dense, misty forest at dawn, with soft golden light filtering through the trees.
Change the background of the cartoon graphic on the hoodie from a nighttime cityscape to a sunny tropical beach with palm trees and ocean waves.

text: Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting with soft, blended edges and visible brushstrokes, maintaining the autumn colors and the person's silhouette.

demos.text: Change the color scheme of the entire website from dark wood and beige to a vibrant pastel palette, replacing the dark wood furniture with soft mint green and light pink finishes, and updating the background to a light lavender hue.
Change the car's color from silver with blue stripes to a vibrant metallic red with gold racing stripes.
Transform the scene into a surreal, dreamlike landscape by changing the grass to a glowing neon green and replacing the rocks with smooth, translucent crystal formations that emit a soft blue light.

Change the woman's outfit to a futuristic silver jumpsuit with glowing blue accents, while keeping her pose and the football. Replace the American and Texas flags with holographic digital displays showing football statistics.
Change the lighting to a dramatic sunset glow, casting warm orange and pink hues across the dress and wall, with long shadows extending from the right.
Change the color scheme from patriotic red, white, and blue to a monochromatic sepia tone, giving the poster a vintage, aged appearance while preserving all details and text.

Convert the electrical wiring diagram into a steampunk-inspired illustration, replacing the modern outlets and switches with brass-and-copper mechanical components, adding gears and pressure gauges, and giving the wires a metallic, pipe-like appearance.
Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting style, keeping the two speakers and the comic convention backdrop recognizable but rendered with soft, flowing brushstrokes and blended colors.

text: Transform the scene into a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape at night, with the SUV glowing in electric blue and purple hues, rain creating light trails, and futuristic holographic signs floating in the background.

demos.text: Change the stainless steel grill to have a weathered, rusted metal texture with peeling paint and visible wear, giving it a vintage, abandoned look.
Change the color scheme to a monochromatic blue and silver palette, giving the image a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic while maintaining the original composition and details.
Change the watch face from a cream-colored analog dial to a futuristic digital display showing a blue neon time readout with a grid pattern background.
Transform the image into a dramatic oil painting style with rich, dark tones and visible brushstrokes, giving it a classical portrait feel.
Change the watch to a silver case with a white dial, retain the black leather strap, and add a subtle golden glow to the lighting.
Change the white plastic storage box to a transparent acrylic version with a subtle blue tint, revealing the contents inside while maintaining the same structure and dimensions.
Change the black ink tattoo of Buddha on the finger to a vibrant, glowing neon green color with a soft bioluminescent aura, as if it's emitting light.

Change the color scheme to a monochromatic black and white, with the dice and box rendered in grayscale while maintaining the original textures and lighting to create a high-contrast, vintage photographic effect.

text: Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and a palette of teal, coral, and warm gold accents, while keeping the woman's pose and the gym environment recognizable.

demos.text: Change the wooden cake toppers to have a glowing, bioluminescent effect with soft blue light emanating from the carved letters and wood grain.
Change the lighting from warm yellow to cool blue, making the scene feel like a nighttime performance under moonlight.
Change the vase's glaze to a matte finish and replace the orange flowers with stylized blue and white porcelain flowers in a traditional Japanese kintsugi style.
Change the color of the bright green wall to a deep, textured navy blue, transforming the scene's mood from stark and urban to moody and somber.
Change the lighting to a warm sunset glow, casting long shadows and golden highlights on the kitten and the toys, while keeping the background white.
Change the background to a snowy winter forest at dusk, with soft falling snow and distant pine trees illuminated by a pale moon.
Change the man's black t-shirt to a vibrant red color while keeping the rest of the image the same.

Transform the scene into a winter wonderland by adding a light dusting of snow on the tables, chairs, and floor, and replace the warm candlelight with cool blue moonlight filtering through the windows.

text: Change the scene to a futuristic version with neon lights, holographic signs, and advanced combat gear, transforming the setting into a cyberpunk warehouse district.

demos.text: Change the scene from a sunny desert port to a rainy urban alley at night, with wet pavement reflecting neon signs and the character holding an umbrella instead of a gun.
Change the background projection screen to display a dynamic, animated city skyline at night with glowing lights and moving vehicles, while keeping the speaker and podium unchanged.
Change the warm orange pendant light to a cool blue LED light that emits a soft glow, creating a futuristic ambiance in the stairwell.
Change the red heart with "KC" to a blue heart with the letters "NY" in white.
Change the color scheme of the monster truck from lime green to deep metallic blue with silver flame accents, while keeping the fiery red and orange flames on the side.

Change the scene to a snowy winter day, with snow gently falling and covering the ground, while the woman remains in her wheelchair holding the bouquet, now with a light dusting of snow on her hair and shoulders.
Change the glowing green sphere to have a metallic silver finish with a brushed metal texture, while keeping the green leaves and the soft lighting effect.
Transform the Stargate logo into a glowing, bioluminescent version with soft blue and green organic light pulsing through the symbols, giving it an alien, living appearance.

text: Change the large billboard to display a vibrant watercolor-style painting of a cityscape instead of the current advertisement.

demos.text: Change the black rubber boots to shiny, metallic silver boots with a reflective surface, keeping the same position and stance.
Transform the image into a dramatic oil painting style, emphasizing rich textures and deep shadows to enhance the gritty, intense atmosphere of the climber's struggle.
Change the scene to a rainy, overcast day with wet surfaces reflecting the gray sky, adding raindrops to the air and making the debris and machinery appear slick and damp.
Change the handbag and box to a vibrant emerald green with gold hardware, maintaining the same leather texture and stitching details.
Transform the wooden hutch into a glowing, bioluminescent cabinet with soft blue light emanating from within the shelves and glass doors, creating a mystical, otherworldly effect.
Change the woman's dark blue top to a vibrant red blouse with a subtle pattern.
Convert the architectural line drawing into a realistic, full-color photograph of a modern kitchen with stainless steel appliances, white quartz countertops, and warm ambient lighting.
Change the time of day to bright midday with clear blue skies, making the house appear under sunny daytime lighting while keeping all architectural details and landscaping intact.

text: Change the color scheme to a sunset ocean theme, making the background a deep orange and purple gradient, turning the sea creatures into silhouettes with glowing outlines, and changing the text to white with a soft glow.

demos.text: Transform the image into a soft watercolor painting style, preserving the baby's features and clothing details with gentle brushstrokes and blended colors.
Change the device to a futuristic silver metallic finish with glowing blue circuit patterns on the surface and add a holographic display showing data flow above each fan.
Change the background from dark purple smoke to a bright, sunny outdoor basketball court with a clear blue sky and green grass surrounding the court.
Transform the scene into a winter wonderland by adding a light layer of snow on the rooftops, ground, and plant pots, and changing the sky to a soft, overcast gray with falling snowflakes.
Change the lighting scheme from cool blue-green to warm amber and orange, making the corridor feel like it's lit by glowing embers and fire, while keeping all other elements the same.
Change the mannequin's hair from blonde to vibrant red with a wavy, shoulder-length style and add subtle highlights.

Transform the scene into a dramatic nighttime battle with a full moon overhead, casting long shadows and a silvery glow on the figures. Add swirling fog around the base and a subtle aurora in the sky.

Transform the scene into a steampunk-inspired theater with brass and copper machinery integrated into the archway, glowing with warm amber lights, while the celestial backdrop shifts to a cloudy sky with floating gears and airships.

text: Transform the modern house into a cozy mountain cabin with a stone and wood exterior, adding a warm, glowing porch light and a rustic wooden deck with a fire pit, while keeping the surrounding forest and rocky landscape.

demos.text: Change the color scheme to a vibrant, retro 1980s aesthetic with neon green, magenta, and cyan accents on the frame and chains, while keeping the base black and adding a subtle glow effect around the equipment.

Convert the technical diagram into a vibrant watercolor illustration, where the speaker components are painted with soft, blended hues of teal, burnt orange, and cream, while maintaining all labels and structural details.
Change the wooden deck to a smooth, polished black stone surface with subtle vein patterns, while keeping all other elements in the scene unchanged.

Change the woman's outfit to a vibrant red wool coat over a cream-colored turtleneck sweater, paired with dark brown leather pants and black ankle boots. Replace the tan belt with a black leather belt.
Change the color scheme from blue and white to a vibrant sunset palette, replacing all blue elements with gradients of orange, pink, and purple, while keeping the white background and text legible.
Change the man's white shirt to a light blue button-up shirt with a subtle pattern.
Change the house color from yellow to a warm terracotta orange with a stucco texture, update the roof tiles to a darker brown, and add a small covered porch with wooden beams at the entrance.
Change the artistic style to a watercolor painting, making the colors more translucent and the edges softer, while keeping the Thanksgiving theme and the two owls in their Pilgrim attire.

text: Convert the entire image to a vibrant color palette, enhancing the whites of the wedding dress and veil, the reds of the groom's tie, and the natural skin tones, while maintaining the black and white architecture and background for contrast.

demos.text: Change the purple wall to a deep forest green and replace the black frames with rustic wooden ones.
Change the blue flowers to vibrant red roses while keeping the same bouquet structure and glass vase.

Change the color scheme to a dark mode theme, replacing the white background with a deep navy blue, the text with white, and the blue graphic elements with glowing cyan. Add subtle digital glitch effects to the edges of the cover.

Convert the hallway into a futuristic, cyberpunk-inspired corridor with glowing neon lights in blue and purple, replacing the traditional wall sconces and ceiling lights. Add holographic displays on the walls and a reflective, wet floor that mirrors the neon glow.

Transform the building's exterior into a vibrant nighttime scene with glowing neon lights in blue and purple hues illuminating the glass facade and the "THE SEIKO MUSEUM GINZA" sign, while the clock display emits a warm golden glow.
Change the background to a futuristic cityscape at night with glowing neon lights and flying vehicles.

Transform the image to a vibrant autumn scene by changing the tree bark to warm orange and yellow tones, adding golden and red leaves to the branches, and replacing the sky with a soft orange and pink sunset.

text: Transform the bedroom into a cozy winter retreat by adding a light dusting of snow outside the windows, changing the lighting to a soft, warm golden hour glow, and replacing the green tree with a small decorated Christmas tree next to the rocking chair.

demos.text: Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, blending soft, flowing colors while maintaining the couple's intimate pose and the forest setting.

Transform the scene into a vibrant, sunlit day with clear blue skies, replacing the overcast weather. Add lush green trees and colorful flowers growing amidst the rubble, and change the damaged buildings to have bright, restored facades with clean windows and new awnings.

Convert the architectural floor plan into a vibrant, colorful 3D rendering with a modern, minimalist design style, using soft pastel colors for the rooms and transparent glass textures for the walls, while keeping all room labels and dimensions visible.
Change the camera's color from purple to metallic silver while keeping all text and details intact.
Change the color scheme to a monochromatic blue, making all the red elements in the image appear as varying shades of blue, while keeping the lighting and composition the same.

Change the color scheme to a winter theme by making the roses white instead of cream, replacing the red berries with white snowflakes, and changing the wall to a soft blue-gray with a light snowfall effect.

Transform the image into a vibrant, saturated color palette with a warm, golden-hour glow, enhancing the sky to a rich orange and yellow gradient while making the rust on the car glow with fiery highlights.
